user.title: Connect to Palworld server
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Palworld dedicated server's REST API. The REST API must be enabled in PalWorldSettings.ini (RESTAPIEnabled=True).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate with Palworld server
reauth_confirm.description: The admin password for this Palworld server is no longer valid. Enter the new password to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host, port, and that the REST API is enabled.

announce.name: Announce
announce.description: Broadcast a message to all players on the server.

kick.name: Kick player
kick.description: Kick a player from the server.

message.name: Message
message.description: Message shown to the kicked player.

ban.name: Ban player
ban.description: Ban a player from the server.

message.name: Message
message.description: Message shown to the banned player.

unban.name: Unban player
unban.description: Remove a ban for a player.

shutdown.name: Shutdown server
shutdown.description: Gracefully shut down the server after a delay.

waittime.name: Wait time
waittime.description: Seconds to wait before shutting down.

force_stop.name: Force stop server
force_stop.description: Immediately stop the server with no save or grace period.
